name: Blinker Fluid
description: Synthetic formula engineered for crisper, brighter, more rhythmic turn signals. Universal fit.

name: Left-Handed Screwdriver
description: Ergonomically counter-threaded for lefties. Will absolutely spin righties into a state of confusion.

name: Inflatable Dartboard
description: Space-saving design. Includes a patch kit because you are definitely going to need it.

name: Muffler Bearings (Pack of 4)
description: Eliminates that pesky exhaust wobble. Pre-greased with premium snake oil.

name: Replacement Cloud Storage (Physical Bucket)
description: A literal galvanized steel bucket optimized for catching data leaks and overhead Wi-Fi drift.

name: Solar-Powered Flashlight
description: Eco-friendly illumination. Only works when exposed to direct, blinding sunlight.

name: Wireless USB Cable
description: Gluten-free, Zero carbs, 100% data fidelity. Perfect for tech-savvy diets. Type-C to Type-Wheat.

name: Organic Password Generator
description: Hand-raised, artisanal characters harvested only when fully mature. No artificial algorithms used.

name: Diet Water
description: All the hydration of regular water, but with 50% less heavy hydrogen. Zero wetness.

name: Bluetooth-pick
description: Tracks dental plaque metrics in real-time. Over-the-air splinter updates included.

name: Ice Cubes
description: Package only includes cubes. Water and cold to be added!

name: Elbow Grease
description: Hard work in a can. Spray liberally onto projects to bypass actual physical effort.

name: Smart Wallet
description: Features smart-leak technology that automatically dispenses your cash to local vendors via proximity sensors.

name: Waterproof Towel
description: Hydrophobic nano-coating ensures this towel stays bone dry, no matter how wet you are.

name: Pre-Tangled Headphones
description: Save 15 minutes of your life. Comes fresh out of the box in a mathematically impossible nautical knot.

name: Bespoke Static Electricity (10-Pack)
description: Artisanal, small-batch shocks captured via high-pile shag carpets. Quality may vary.

name: Air Guitar Strings
description: Ultra-low gauge, 100% transparent nylon. Guaranteed never to snap, rust, or exist.
